listitem.para: What are the three main dialects spoken in Thailand? How might you get an interpreter for each dialect?
What are nonverbal practices used by Thais?
Identify at least two genetic conditions common among Thais. What implications do they have for health and health teaching?
Identify common health conditions among Thais.
What is Tom-Yum? What are the ingredients and what are its health properties? For what conditions is it advantageous?
6. Som-tum? What are the ingredients and what are its health properties? For what conditions is it advantageous?
What foods might be avoided among some Thai postpartum women? Why are these foods avoided?
What is the dominant religion of Thais? What are its principles?
Identify several Thai folk practices. For what conditions are they used?
What are the roles of men and women in traditional Thai culture?
